headline: ITW BOARD OF DIRECTORS DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
summary: GLENVIEW - The Board of Directors of Illinois Tool Works Inc. declared a dividend on the company's common stock of $1.61 per share for the second quarter of 2026.The dividend equates to $6.44 per...
